title: CrateTime!
body:
# Lootcrates!!! 
The CrateTime mod is centered around a new block, the lootcrate! By breaking it open you will recieve some awesome goodies! The mod comes with seven new tiers of lootcrate, from Starter, to Godly! As well as some other stuff to grow your lootcrate empire!

## The lootcrate tiers are as follows:
- Starter: Dirt and saplings. a humble begining into the world of lootcrates
- Basic: Fire, and Ice! With enough luck (or lootcrates) the basic crate will get you your own cobblestone generator!
- Novice: A foray into farming! This crate will get your food empire up and running!
- Intermediate: Iron and passive mobs, this crate will start the industrial age, with mob farms and iron production!
- Advanced: (almost) All the rare metals are here, as this crate can get you gold emeralds and diamonds!
- Glorious: This crate came from the depths of hell, and is fillled with all the nethers best goodies! Netherite glowstone, maybe even a wither spawn egg!
- Godly: This crate has all the end's treasures, as well as some ~~illegal blocks~~


### This mod is made as an alternate progression system for skyblock
